an1.616:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, do not partake of the deathless who do not partake of *sati* directed to the body.
an1.616:1.2: Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, partake of the deathless who partake of *sati* directed to the body."
an1.617:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not partaken of by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not partaken of.
an1.617:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is partaken of by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is partaken of."
an1.618:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is neglected by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is neglected.
an1.618:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not neglected by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not neglected."
an1.619:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is missed by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is missed.
an1.619:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not missed by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not missed."
an1.620:1.1: "Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, were negligent of the deathless who were negligent of *sati* directed to the body.
an1.620:1.2: Those *bhikkhus*, *bhikkhus*, were not negligent of the deathless who were not negligent of *sati* directed to the body."
an1.621:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is forgotten by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is forgotten.
an1.621:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not forgotten by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not forgotten."
an1.622:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not practiced by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not practiced.
an1.622:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is practiced by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is practiced."
an1.623:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not developed [*abhāvitā*] by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not developed [*abhāvitā*].
an1.623:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is developed [*bhāvitā*] by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is developed [*bhāvitā*]."
an1.624:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not made much of by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not made much of.
an1.624:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is made much of by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is made much of."
an1.625:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not directly known by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not directly known.
an1.625:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is directly known by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is directly known."
an1.626:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not fully understood by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not fully understood.
an1.626:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is fully understood by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is fully understood."
an1.627:1.1: "The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is not realized by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is not realized.
an1.627:1.2: The deathless, *bhikkhus*, is realized by those by whom *sati* directed to the body is realized."
an1.627:2.2: Delighted, those *bhikkhus* rejoiced in the *Bhagavā*'s words.
an1.627:2.4: The Book of Ones is complete.
